description: Skill compatibility registry mapping skill IDs to supported AI harnesses. Each skill entry has boolean flags for 'claude', 'codex', 'qwen', and optionally 'deepseek' indicating which harnesses can run it.

android-screenshots.description: Pull screenshots from a USB-attached Android device via adb

bible-study.description: Study a Bible passage with full text, background, and visual HTML infographic

brain-chat.description: Save useful conversation output as a brain document

brain-name.description: Generate a file-safe name for a brain document

brain-url.description: Fetch a URL and save its content as a brain document

calendar.description: Show today's calendar events using EventKit (Exchange/Outlook support)

claude-docs.description: Fetch and cache Claude Code documentation from Anthropic's website

deletemail.description: Delete mail matching criteria from Apple Mail accounts

digi.description: Switch to the Digital Dashboard (digibot) project directory

enrich-spreadsheet.description: Enrich a Knox device spreadsheet with MongoDB store information

hive-desktopbee-proof.description: Prove the DesktopBee helper — AX query/act, AppleScript/JXA, capture, approval gate

hive-qwen-readiness.description: Check the local Qwen model's readiness — serving, tool-calls, think-separation, decode rate

hive-run-all-proofs.description: Run every HiveMatrix proof/health check in sequence and report pass/fail

hive-scope-wall.description: Run the architecture scope-wall guard against forbidden brands/surfaces

hive-soak.description: Run HiveMatrix soak scenarios (usage-exhaustion → local-only degrade → restore)

hive-update-proof.description: Prove the update-apply path — backup, migrations, relaunch, self-check, rollback

hive-verify-release.description: Prove the live auto-update feed — versions, tag, GitHub release, and latest.json agree

mobile-sync.description: Generate a business-context briefing for use with Claude mobile app

mongo.description: Fetch sample documents from a MongoDB collection as schema reference context

mongoq.description: Read-only ad-hoc query CLI over the Atlas digibot MongoDB

n-agentic-harnesses.description: Design and evaluate agentic harnesses for AI-powered developer tools

present.description: Generate a single offline-ready HTML presentation with keyboard navigation

projectref.description: Create or update a brain project reference with architecture overview and Mermaid diagrams

pushall.description: Commit and push all unpushed git changes across known project directories

release-hivematrix.description: Deterministically release HiveMatrix — bump, build signed app+DMG, publish update feed

resume.description: Resume a previously suspended session by injecting a saved context file

screenshot.description: View the most recent screenshots from the Drive screenshots folder

storelookup.description: Full deep-dive lookup on any EssilorLuxottica retail store

suspend.description: Suspend the current session by capturing full context into a resume file

symlinks.description: Show all symlinks across Claude Code config profiles

topemail.description: Pull most recent emails from key contacts across Apple Mail accounts

usageleft.description: Check Claude usage vs. daily/weekly allotment with visual bar graphs

weekly-ai-roundup.description: Research this week's AI news and generate a newsletter and meeting topic document
